terms.$value: *Personal Contract Hire (PCH). Initial rental £2,608.58, followed by 23 monthly rentals of £217.38 (inc. VAT). 6,000 miles p.a. You will not own the car. Excess mileage charges and return conditions apply. Subject to availability and credit status. T&Cs apply. 18+. Autotrader Limited is a credit broker, not a lender
